title: Opendoor Looks to Entice Sellers With Bonus Cash After Resale
text: Opendoor has launched Cash Plus, a new offering that provides home sellers with both an immediate cash payment and potential additional profits if the property resales exceed the company's acquisition and renovation costs. The initiative allows sellers to receive cash now alongside upside later—a share of profits from Opendoor's resale if the numbers work out favorably. The program is rolling out initially in Dallas, Nashville, and Raleigh before expanding to all Opendoor markets. Opendoor connects interested sellers with partner agents through its Key Connections program, an invite-only referral network launched earlier in 2025. According to Nick Boniakowski, Opendoor's head of agent partnerships: Cash Plus leverages what Opendoor and its trusted agent partners do best and bridges the gap between cash offers and traditional sales. Opendoor has not disclosed details about typical profit margins or what percentage sellers would receive. The company notes potential future profits, suggesting sellers may receive no additional proceeds in some cases. This initiative reflects Opendoor's broader strategy to expand agent partnerships and move toward profitability after years of significant losses.
